summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new features: 1) VerifyEmail page frontend, 2) Pioneer message in MusicianDashboard header, 3) No automatic PRO status for new musicians. All 8 test cases passed (4 backend + 4 frontend).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auth/verify-email?token=invalid returns 404 with 'Token de vérification invalide'
Backend: POST /api/auth/register for musician sets subscription_tier='free', is_pro=false, pro_subscription_status='inactive'
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with test@gmail.com / test returns 200 with token
Frontend: /verify-email without token displays 'Lien invalide' message
Frontend: 'Retour à la connexion' button redirects to /auth
Frontend: Login with test@gmail.com / test redirects to /musician dashboard
Frontend: Pioneer message visible in MusicianDashboard header between logo and navigation icons
critical_code_review_comments: VerifyEmail.jsx correctly handles all states: loading, success, already, error, expired, no-token
Pioneer message uses 'hidden md:inline' class - only visible on desktop (correct behavior per requirements)
Registration endpoint correctly sets subscription_tier='free' and is_pro=false for new musicians
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_verify_email_and_registration.py - Created test suite for verify-email and registration
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test account
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features verified working: 1) VerifyEmail page at /verify-email handles no-token, invalid-token, and button redirect correctly. 2) Pioneer message in MusicianDashboard header is visible on desktop between logo and nav icons. 3) New musician registration does NOT assign PRO status (subscription_tier=free, is_pro=false). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_verify_email_and_registration.py

verify_email_page.invalid_token_state: Displays 'Erreur de verification' with XCircle icon

pioneer_message_header.location: MusicianDashboard header, between logo and navigation icons
pioneer_message_header.text: Vous êtes le pionnier de la nouvelle connexion musicale. Soyez patient, les données grandiront de semaine en semaine.
